verses.text: Tua ciangin Kumpi David in a kikhawm khempeuhte kiangah, “Pasian in amah bek a teelsa ka tapa Solomon pen khangno-in pumpi tawh sinna om nailo a, nasep ding pen lian mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih biakinn lianpi pen mihing-a' ding hilo a, Topa Pasian-a' ding ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian' biakinn dingin ka hih theihzah ciang, phuh dingin onik suang, suangpak, mel tuamtuam a nei suang, suangkang, leh suangmanpha nam khempeuh tampi takte banah kham zatna ding nate-ah kham, ngun zatna ding nate-ah ngun, sumngo zatna ding nate-ah sumngo, sik zatna ding nate-ah sik, leh sing zatna ding nate-ah sing ka koih khinzo hi
Tua thamloin, a siangtho biakinn-a dingin ka koihte khempeuh banah, ngun leh kham keima-a' mahmah zong om a, ka Pasian' biakinn ka ngaihsutna hangin ka Pasian' inn-ah ka piakte
Kawm zutna dingin Ofir gam kham ahi kham talen tul thum, leh a kisiangsaksa ngun talen tul sagih

leh siamneelte in a hih ding nasepna khempeuh-a dingin kham zatna ding nate-ah kham, leh ngun zatna ding nate-ah ngun ahi hi. Kua teng utna lungsim tawh Topa' tungah tuni-in amahmah kipia-in ki-ap ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin beh lutangte in utthu-a piakna bawl uh a, minam makaite, a tul tula a ukte leh a za za-a a ukte, leh kumpipa' nasepna-ah a uk uliante in zong hih uh hi
Amaute in Pasian' biakinn nasepna dingin kham talen tul nga leh kham darik tul sawm, ngun talen tul sawm, sumngo talen tul sawm leh tul giat, leh sik talen tul za khat a pia uh hi
Suangmanpha a nei peuhmah in Gershon mi Jehiel' kepna sung, Topa' biakinn sung vanmanpha koihna-ah a pia uh hi

Tua ciangin hih mite in utna lungsim tawh pia uh ahih manin mite lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa' tungah pia ziahziah uh a, kumpi David zong nakpi takin a lungdam hi.
Tua ahih ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh' omna-ah David in Topa phat hi. David in, “Nang, Topa, ka pu uh Israel Pasian aw, a tawntungin thupha ngah ta in

Topa aw, liatna, vangliatna, minthan'na, guazawhna, leh min liatnate nangma-a' ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh vantung leh leitungah a om khempeuh zong nangma-a' ahi hi. Topa aw, kumpi gam nangma-a' hi a, tuate khempeuh tungah nang a lutangin hong kisangsak hi
Hauhna leh minphatna nangma kiang pan hong pai a, nangmah in na khempeuh tungah na uk hi. Na khutsungah vangliatna leh minthan'na om a, liatsakna ding leh thakhauhsakna ding na khutsungah om hi
Tu-in nangma tungah ka nuam uh hi, kote' Pasian aw, a minthang na min ka phat uh hi

“Ahih hangin kote in hih bangin utna tawh kong piakna dingun kei kua hi a, ka mite bang ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh nang kiang pan hong pai hi a, nangma-a' mah nang tungah a hong pia ka hi uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pu ka pate khempeuh uh mah bangin kote pen nangma mai-ah khualmite leh pemtate ka hi uh hi. Ka hunte uh leitungah nilim bang hi a, sih ding ka pelh thei kei uh hi
Topa kote' Pasian aw, na min siangtho pahtawina dingin nang-a' ding biakinn lamna dingin ka piaksa uh hih a tampite zong nangma khutsung panin hong pai hi a, a vekpi-in nangma-a' mah ahi hi

Nangmah in lungsim entelin thumanna-ah na lungkimna ka thei hi, ka Pasian aw. Lungsim thumanna leh citna tawh hih nate khempeuh kong pia khin a, tu-in nang tungah citna leh lungdamna tawh a hong pia, hih lai-ah a om na mite ka muzo hi
Ka pute uh Abraham, Isaac, leh Israel Pasian, Topa aw, na mite' lungsim sungah tua bang ngimnate leh ngaihsutnate omsak tawntung in la, amaute' lungsim nangma lamah kai in

Amah in a lungsim khempeuh tawh na thupiaknate, na teci pan'nate, leh na thukhamte kemin a vekpi-in sem a, keimah in ka vaihawmsa biakinn lianpi amah in a lam theihna dingin ka tapa Solomon tungah utna lungsim guan' in,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin David in a kikhawmte khempeuh tungah, “ Topa na Pasian uh phat un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh in a pute a pate uh Pasian Topa phatin a lu uh kun uh a, Topa bia-in kumpipa tungah zahtakna a bawl uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in Topa tungah biakpiakna bawl uh a, a zing ciangin Topa tungah meihal biakna bawngtal tul khat, tuutal tul khat, leh tuuno tul khat, a leenggahzu tawh a biakna teng tawh, leh Israel khempeuh-a' dingin biakpiakna tampi a pia uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in tua ni-in lungdamna lianpi tawh Topa' mai-ah pawi khamin a om uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in David' tapa Solomon kumpi-in a nihveina bawl uha, amaute in Topa-a' dingin amah kumpi-in sathau nilhin, siampi dingin Zadok sathau a nilh uh hi
Tua ciangin a pa David tangin Topa' phuhsa kumpi tokhom tungah kumpi-in Solomon a tu hi. Amah a dau pai a, Israel mi khempeuh in ama thu a mang uh hi
Makaite khempeuh leh a thahat mite, leh Kumpi David' tapate khempeuh in zong Kumpi Solomon tungah a thuman ding uh thu ciam uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mi khempeuh muhna-ah Solomon tungah minthan'na lianpi pia a, Israel sungah ama ma-in kumpi khat peuhpeuh tungah a kipia ngei nailo kumpi minliatna a guan' hi
Tua hi a, Jessi' tapa David in Israel khempeuh tungah a uk hi
Israel tungah ama uk hun kum sawmli sung hi a, amah in Hebron-ah kum sagih sung, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthumlethum sung a uk hi
Tua ciangin a khangham, a ni cing, hauhna leh minthan'na tawh a si hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Solomon in ama tangin uk hi
Tu-in Kumpi David' gamtatna a patna pan a tawpna dongin thumupa Samuel' Khang Tangthu sung, kamsang Nathan' Khang Tangthu sung, leh thumupa Gad' Khang Tangthu sungah
ama ukna leh ama vangliatnate khempeuh leh ama tung leh Israel tung, gamsung kumpi gamte khempeuh tungah a tung thute a kiciamtehna tawh kigelh khawm hi.
